name: Loud Room
description: This is a vast chamber whose ceiling is lost to distance and noise. A narrow passage runs east to west, and a stone stairway leads upward, both partially swallowed by a relentless rushing sound that fills the space. The noise reverberates from every surface, making concentration difficult and conversation pointless. On the floor lies a massive platinum bar, resting in plain view as though its presence has long since been accepted.
